extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ won stage 6 in a reduced sprint after a late split, taking third consecutive stage victory and extending GC lead to 18 seconds over ALMEIDA.
tactical_patterns: KELDERMAN crash forced Jumbo-Visma tactical reset, losing control when key domestique fell mid-stage from concentration lapse.
COSNEFROY Movistar counterattack with ARANBURU and VERONA split peloton but Ineos grenadiers chased for GEOGHEGAN HART.
WOODS attack under flamme rouge effective at shedding domestiques, isolating GC contenders before final sprint.
ROGLIČ positioned perfectly in reduced sprint, outpowering fresher climbers by saving energy throughout final circuit chaos.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: third consecutive stage win demonstrates exceptional form recovery, now controlling race with 18-second advantage
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: second place shows strong finishing despite Ineos working chase, competitive GC form emerging
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: third place and second overall despite UAE doing chase work, white jersey position holds under pressure
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: negative: dropped significantly in GC rankings after late split, major setback for Bora stage race ambitions
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: crash from momentary concentration lapse cost Jumbo key domestique, forced team tactical reorganization
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: late attack isolated GC riders, demonstrating Canadian excels at tactical disruption in finale scenarios
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: fourth place after Movistar played strong team tactics but ran out of resources in final meters
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: positive: finished in select group despite not being pure climber, showing versatility in mixed terrain
